name: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp.
summary: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. engages in the mineral exploration activities. It primarily focuses on exploring gold deposits. The company holds interests in the Lazy Claims property that consist of three claims covering 60 acres located Mineral County, Nevada; and the Loman property, which includes 27 unpatented mining claims covering an area of approximately 540 acres located in Mineral County, Nevada. The company was formerly known as Tech Foundry Ventures, Inc. and changed its name to Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. in July 2016. Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. was founded in 2014 and is based in Reno, Nevada.
